stem: In triangle PQR, angle Q is a right angle. The length of side PQ is 7√41 and the length of side QR is 24√41. What is the length of side PR?
rationale: By the Pythagorean theorem, PR² = (7√41)² + (24√41)² = 49·41 + 576·41 = 625·41, so PR = 25√41. Choice A results from subtracting the coefficients (24−7). Choice B results from adding the coefficients (7+24). Choice D results from taking √(25·41) instead of √(625·41).
